title: See Through Armor
description: Makes BOTH armor and skin clearly visible.
body:
I could'nt find a resource pack where BOTH armor AND skin is clearly visible. Either i can not see the masterpiece some guy spend a whole 30 minutes on, or i can't understand which type o' armor they wear right now

But hey! I can draw! So i drew! I tried to make armor clearly visible but not blocking the skin. Also, i've checked, player can easily understand what specifically someone wears (leggins or boots, chestplate or leggins etc.)

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KZiFQ8ls/images/527019b8899ee21a27561571f53036327393be6f.png)
